ddls:
CREATE TABLE "biodiversity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the metric was collected */,
  "diversity_type" INTEGER /* Type of diversity metric (e.g., Species richness, Shannon diversity) */,
  "observed_value" INTEGER /* Observed value for the diversity metric */,
  "estimator_value" REAL /* Estimated value for the diversity metric */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the estimator */,
  "lower_confidence_limit" REAL /* Lower confidence limit of the estimator */,
  "upper_confidence_limit" REAL /* Upper confidence limit of the estimator */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the estimation */,
  "species_count" INTEGER /* Number of species observed */,
  "simpson_correlation" REAL /* Simpson's correlation coefficient */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the metric was collected */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to collect the metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the confidence limits */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., field survey, satellite imagery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biodiversity_metrics_diversity_type FOREIGN KEY ("diversity_type") REFERENCES diversity_types ("diversity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biodiversity_metrics_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., Bosque Ripario, Palma) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., forest, wetland) */,
  "protection_status" TEXT /* Protection status of the site (e.g., protected, unprotected) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_types" (
  "diversity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity type */,
  "diversity_name" TEXT /* Name of the diversity metric (e.g., Species richness, Shannon diversity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diversity metric */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula used to calculate the diversity metric */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to a scientific paper or source that defines the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diversity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher for emergency contact */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Areas of research interest (e.g., avian ecology, plant diversity) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric collection event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric collected */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the metric */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the collection event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the collection event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the collection event */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for the collection (e.g., transect walk, quadrat sampling) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_collections_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_collections_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES biodiversity_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxonomy" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "last_sighting_date" TEXT /* Date of the last recorded sighting of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_metrics" (
  "species_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a species and a metric */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species observed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric collected for the species */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of the species observed */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the species in the sample (e.g., number of times observed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_metrics_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES biodiversity_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used in the report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Summary of the data used in the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES biodiversity_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for emergency contact */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken by the user during the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
